jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Full Vitest passed 172 files / 693 tests; Quick Services app-source/API/service regressions passed 26/26
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted and active; /api/status healthy; /quick-services returned 307; /api/quick-services returned 401; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P6 Quick Services catalog/list query bounds
lastRun.summary: Bounded Quick Services installed-service listing, remote app catalog hydration, and enabled app-source enumeration so catalog/API responses cannot grow without limit as operators add services or external app sources.
validation: no overlapping remediation/build/test process found before work
production services active and /api/status healthy before work
systemctl restart vcontrolhub-next.service vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service succeeded; both active
recent production logs checked with no error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted and smoke-tested successfully.
lastRun.nextTarget: Fresh comprehensive audit/update because the successful remediation counter has crossed the configured threshold; continue with P6 durable worker ownership/queue claims or newly discovered higher-value items.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
